title: Orchestration Session
description: Session-level metadata. One session = one task workspace under .orchestration/<slug>/.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump when shape changes incompatibly.

name.description: Slug used as directory name. Lowercase, kebab-case.

description.description: Optional longer description of the session intent.

updatedAt.description: Last time any artifact in this session was written.

workers.description: Worker slugs registered in this session. Maintained by session.cjs.
